blended.narrative: Bromley is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. Looking ahead, 13 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 51°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Thursday: light rain showers, highs of 55°F.
Sunday: 3.3" of snow, highs of 27°F. Expect powder.
Saturday: 2.4" of snow, highs of 22°F. Expect powder.
